profile.name: Muhammad Wisnu Ainun Najib
profile.role: Frontend Developer - IT Development at AirNav Indonesia
profile.aboutDesc1: Hello! I'm a passionate Frontend Developer dedicated to building responsive and user-friendly web applications. With a strong technical foundation in modern web technologies, I'm always eager to solve complex problems and craft elegant interface solutions.
profile.aboutDesc2: Currently part of the IT Development team at AirNav Indonesia, gaining hands-on experience in a professional environment and real-world projects that demand high-level system performance and reliability. In addition to software engineering, I also focus on architecture design and continuous maintenance.

about.title: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
about.description: A graduate of D4 Computer Engineering Technology, Department of Electrical Engineering, from Politeknik Negeri Semarang with a strong interest in IT, particularly in engineering and maintenance roles. Experienced in website development and system maintenance. During an internship, I honed my skills in system management and technical problem-solving in real-world environments. Equipped with solid communication and teamwork abilities, ready to contribute to challenging and innovative projects.

about_page.p1: Hello! I am Muhammad Wisnu Ainun Najib, a passionate IT professional and a recent graduate with a Bachelor of Applied Science (S.Tr.T) in Computer Engineering Technology from Politeknik Negeri Semarang. My journey in the tech industry has been driven by a strong fascination with how digital solutions can solve real-world problems. With a solid foundation in engineering principles, I have cultivated a deep interest in software development, system maintenance, and crafting user-centered applications that are both highly functional and scalable.
about_page.p2: Currently, I am expanding my technical expertise at AirNav Indonesia within the IT Development & Operations team. In this role, I actively develop modern, full-scale web applications. Recently, I built a comprehensive Helpdesk platform using Nuxt.js and an event management system using Vue.js. I truly enjoy the challenge of building dynamic and complex features, such as engineering sub-second latency real-time chat systems with WebSockets and integrating complex REST APIs with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
about_page.p3: Beyond modern web development, I am an adaptable engineer who loves exploring the intersection of different technologies. My portfolio includes developing FishFresh, an offline-first mobile application integrated with a Computer Vision model (YOLOv8) to classify objects in real-time, as well as hands-on experience in IT infrastructure maintenance during my time at Jasa Marga (JMTO). Equipped with strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset, I am always ready to contribute to challenging, innovative projects that push the boundaries of technology and deliver tangible business value.

job1.position: IT Development - Enterprise Technology Planning & It Operations
job1.desc1: Developed 2 web applications: built the Helpdesk platform using Nuxt.js and AirNav Event using Vue.js, creating 15+ reusable components to accelerate development speed by 30%.
job1.desc2: Engineered a real-time Chat System for Helpdesk using WebSockets, enabling instant messaging between Admins and Reporters with sub-second latency.
job1.desc2_short: Engineered a real-time Chat System for Helpdesk using WebSockets, enabling instant messaging between Admins and Reporters...
job1.desc3: Integrated 20+ REST API endpoints, managing complex logic for RBAC Authentication and hierarchical data filtering across both platforms.
job1.desc4: Delivered 2 full-scale projects with 100% design fidelity, successfully translating Figma prototypes into functional code within the 3-month internship.

job2.company: PT. Jasamarga Tollroad Operator (JMTO), Semarang - Demak Section
job2.position: IT Support – Transaction, Traffic, and Maintenance Services
job2.desc1: Recorded monthly AVC reports as part of operational monitoring, documented and reported daily traffic flow data at entrance and exit toll gates, including matrices and tariffs.
job2.desc2: Uploaded vehicle incident reports via the Jasa Marga Tollroad Operator website, created handover letters for patrol and ambulance equipment, and designed posters, advertisements, road signs, and highway warnings.
job2.desc3: Monitored system screens regularly to ensure vehicle classification accuracy, repaired unstable automatic barriers, fixed issues with transaction printers, and checked EDC machines.
job2.desc4: Performed maintenance and inspections of toll gate generators, monitored monthly server room temperatures for system maintenance, and conducted audits to ensure the readiness of all devices, facilities, and infrastructure.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.navEventDesc: NavEvent is a smart and integrated system designed to ensure efficiency, precision, and professionalism in every event. With advanced technology and an intuitive interface, this system facilitates scheduling, participant management, and event progress monitoring.
portfolio.helpdeskDesc: An enterprise-scale internal support management system built to accelerate the IT team's response time. With an intuitive interface and real-time communication integration, this system streamlines the workflow seamlessly from problem reporting to final resolution.
portfolio.fishfreshDesc: A mobile application that functions as a solution for automatic and real-time classification of milkfish freshness. Utilizing Artificial Intelligence based on Computer Vision with the YOLOv8 model for high accuracy.

proj1.title: Project NavEvent
proj1.desc: Web platform for event discovery, registration and management.

proj2.title: Makroni Kapok-Kapok Website
proj2.desc: Company profile and e-commerce website for the 'Makroni Kapok-Kapok' brand.

proj3.title: Project Translator
proj3.desc: A simple web tool for translating text between languages in real-time.
